questionHtml:
Which processes are involved in the development of cancer?

I. Mutations occur in oncogenes.

II. Oncogenes prevent cancer.

III. Oncogenes affect cell cycle regulatory proteins.

A. I and II only

B. I and III only

C. II and III only

D. I, II and III

meta.title: Which processes are involved in the development of cancer? I. Mutations occur in oncogenes. II. Oncogenes prevent cancer. III. Oncogenes affect cell cycle regulatory proteins. A. I
breadcrumbLabels: D2.1.16. Consequences of mutations in genes that control the cell cycle
D1.3.6. Consequences of mutation in germ cells and somatic cells
